We are showing only the top 6 records out of 13. The total number of invoices with available payment data is 13, and 7 invoices were omitted due to data truncation.

This recommendation is based on the available cash and due dates of the invoices. I prioritized invoices from vendors who are marked as "Preferred" (due to the tool result's "vendor_preferred" field), and invoices that are due soonest. In the case of a tie (e.g., VINV-4003 and VINV-4008 both have a due date of April 14 and 29, respectively, but are due after VINV-4016 by a few days), I selected the ones with a lower balance (i.e., VINV-4016).

We have an available cash of $996,285.30, which seems sufficient to cover some of these due invoices.
